playlist_title: Press Conference: The Danger of Nuclear War Is Real, and Must Be Stopped

videos.title: Col. Black: U.S. Nuclear Policy is No Longer Defensive, but OFFENSIVE
videos.description:
Col. Richard Black (ret.) speaks at the Schiller Institute Emergency Press Conference, "The Danger of Nuclear War Is Real, and Must Be Stopped" at the National Press Club in Washington D.C. 

Full press conference is available here: https://schillerinstitute.com/blog/2024/06/07/emergency-press-conference-the-danger-of-nuclear-war-is-real/
